items.name: Monocuco

items.description: Maintainer of 'Mi horario UN', an open source web application for students of Universidad del Norte, which facilitates the import of class schedules to Google Calendar.
items.name: Mi horario UN

items.content: 4 years ago I wrote the first commit for https://lnkd.in/ewy5VDT6. I was using Google Calendar for all work meetings and I thought it would also be useful to sync my Uni schedule with Calendar and receive notifications 15 minutes earlier so I wouldn't be late for classes.Today that app has been used by 33k students, 3,6k schedules have been imported, it has over 45k page views, 25 closed issues and 242 commits. I am very happy to see how small solutions have a big impact and how the students themselves keep it alive ❤️.

data.description: Importa tu horario Uninorte al calendario de Google, recibe notificaciones, personalizalo y descargalo.
data.title: Mi horario UN

items.content: I used to say I knew Python but hadn't gone deep enough. After using it in many projects, including my Bachelor’s degree project, I saw this course and it caught my attention.What I didn't know is that along the way I would find a master class on how to design a syllabus, how to explain complex concepts in a nutshell and how to design engaging assignments. Instead of learning a language, IT concepts or how to use cloud technologies. I learned how to solve problems efficiently.Thanks to Google for this amazing experience.
I’m happy to share that I’m starting a new position as Software Engineer at Getir!

After 5 years of being a college student, I had the opportunity to become a teacher. Little I knew this semester was going to be the one I was going to learn the most. I wanted to take the opportunity to offer the students what I’ve come to understand as key competences within the Backend position.We started from scratch with unix commands to finally build a RESTful API. To understand the why before the code, we took decisions based on concepts that we learned in past courses such as Databases, Operating Systems, Data Structures, Software Design, among others.I enjoyed this process and I’m happy with the results, which wouldn’t be possible without the support of the CEDU team and the participation of the 33 students who were eager to learn along with me.Last but not least, I want to share this photo of my first class. A couple of minutes before starting, I remembered the classes with professor Jesus Estrada, his course allowed me to discover the passion inside me towards Software Engineering. I was nervous and excited to follow his steps, and to try my best to share this passion with the many Software Engineers yet to come.
Orgulloso de haber sido reconocido como uno de los mejores puntajes institucionales en las pruebas Saber Pro 2019

Roberto Acuña, Wilson Tovar and I worked in our free time for the last 6 months with the goal of improving the students' experience in building their schedules at Universidad del Norte. A week ago we launched cronun.co, now we have over 2.1k users and 32k page views. We are very happy to build a software with a great impact ❤️.

data.description: Encuentra tu horario ideal en cuestión de minutos, descárgalo, exportalo, comparalo o compártelo con tus amigos.
data.title: Cronun — Arma tu horario este semestre, compara y comparte
